title: LockerClassic
description: A very easy way to lock contains
body:
🧭 LockerClassic — Smart One-Click Locking

LockerClassic is a lightweight, fast, and intelligent protection plugin that allows players to easily lock their containers with just a sneak + right-click action — no complicated commands, no setup hassle.

✨ Features
	•	🔒 One-click locking — Just crouch and right-click with a sign on any container to instantly protect it.
	•	🧱 Universal container support — Works with all inventory-type blocks (Chests, Barrels, Furnaces, Hoppers, etc.).
	•	🪧 Automatic sign placement — A wall sign appears on the front side showing [Private] and the owner’s name.
	•	👥 Access control list — Owners can edit the sign to add or remove trusted players who can open the container.
	•	🧨 Complete protection — Prevents damage from hoppers, pistons, explosions, or unauthorized breaking.
	•	⚙️ Highly configurable — All messages and behaviors can be customized in config.yml.
	•	💡 No database required — Uses lightweight YAML storage, fully asynchronous and lag-free.

🛠️ Commands
	•	/lc — Simple test command to check plugin status (ok response confirms successful load).

🧩 Compatibility
	•	Minecraft: 1.21.x
	•	Platforms: Paper, Spigot, Bukkit
	•	Java 17+

⚡ Lightweight & Open Source
	•	Fully event-driven, zero tick tasks.
	•	Open-source MIT License.
	•	Developed for performance, readability, and reliability.

⸻

Try it out today!
Protect your builds with smart locking that just works.
No commands. No learning curve. Just [Private].

⸻
